segments.text: King, King, King
Tired inside of you
Yeah, hmm
Hrrr, hrrr, hrrr, hrrr
Hmm, young n***a, hmm
Hmm
Whole gang locked up, young n***a tryin'
Young got it, I won't hit no lip with it yet
What's happen? We flip the boy, pop out his back
Young n***a pop out with err, and I'm at it, err
F*** my n***a, he tell me I went good
I f***ed up and did it bad, just like I should
I hit man, the kids act bad, but it hit me
Talk crazy on the ground, flat chat, they whole hood
It's understood, if I could just f*** her one night
Then break the whole wall, man, I would, hunnid bands in the safe
Let's go hit the gym, K, caught another K
We need a man to f*** up, all of that sticky finger
S***, n***a, you need a bat to f*** up
That b***h say she love me, ha, ha, ha
That s*** made me crack the f*** up, I'ma just
Sip on this water and roll it, don't broke, she know that boy bad
You can just call her cobra, I'm twice, but this on a model
Won't wait, me and Valley takin' him through the swamp
Just like an ogre, from my gang, I'm goin'
Island, ain't talkin' poker, hmm
Cut the boy and did a double, I'm inside
S***, n***a, you scared, I know that she ain't gon' ride
Yo, I ain't believe in affairs, you got the wrong guy
I get the f*** on the coppers with spares, you know I'm all-night
White and black, b***h, on my video, you know they both mine
I turn on that switch, just like a light bulb
I pull out that cloud and get blind, send and send
March, s***, until the Glock die, white b***h
Forever ready, gon' set your ass up, all that whole one is a line
I hit a lick on the east side, way before
I shot the V with two times, you tell me
Make time for a b***h, got me f***ed up, cause I can't even really make mine
Huh, I ain't got time for no b***h
I only got time for makin' money and hit licks
I do not got time, you gon' have f*** with me to f*** my clique
I only got time for puttin' B-rolls in my packet
Ayy, n***a, you say, you caught me outside with no fat, n***a, stop it
Don't think about pullin' that s***, shawty, drop it
We smoke up Tavon till I hire the Rockets
You fly with that gun on the ground, bet you in that Pappet
Huh, I talk to Fed the other day, he like, where the f*** Pappet?
Pull out the Glock the other day, I'm the f***, n***a, try this
She try to f*** the whole damn gang, that lil' h*** can have it
When I swing that dough, you know I'm gon' let that s*** hang
Me and Kel, we don't really do talkin'
We at the high table with no motherf***in' office
She said she don't wanna f*** because I'm cocky
You ain't good for nothin', b***h, but that sloppy taffy
You ain't gon' pull out that s*** for nothin'
Why you gon' post it to Pappet?
You n***a be workin' with 12, heard that Wocky Chomp
Paranoid as a f***, can't go nowhere without my Glocky
